entries.description: Registered via start_session (fable-5). Read spec, verdict, recommendation + primer, Sets 091-094 change-logs; prerequisite 094 confirmed complete; provider keys present; no decision-review queue.

Authored ai-assignment.md: orchestrator fable-5 (operator-invoked; routed rec was sonnet-5/medium - deviation recorded); per-step routing table (docs deliverables routed per delegation discipline; L-064-8 fidelity re-check budgeted).

Authored docs/tutorials/module-team-hello-world.md: routed draft (gemini-2.5-pro, tier 2, USD 0.10 incl. router auto-verify) + orchestrator fidelity pass fixing the auto-verifier's 2 Majors (clipboard-line backticks; missing Open modules.yaml / palette-command coverage) and code-vs-doc defects (Import Project Plan is a file picker, not an AI prompt; CODEOWNERS never review-requests the PR author; direct-push-to-protected-main contradictions; .gitignore for .venv; rollback drill on real tags).

Authored docs/tutorials/module-team-hello-world-review-prompt.md: routed draft (gemini-2.5-pro, tier 2, USD 0.08) + fidelity pass - route() recipe now gathers an evidence bundle (a routed API model cannot read the repo) and the prompt accepts either self-gathered or bundled evidence.

Dogfood PASSED: built hello-modules scratch repo to the walkthrough end-state (trunk, manifest, plans, 3 merged module-stamped sets, CODEOWNERS, 2-layer CI, v0.1.0 + hotfix v0.1.1) + planted violation (004-greeter-polish, module greeter, edits services/clock/clock.py on its in-flight branch). Review prompt routed via the doc's own recipe (gemini-2.5-pro, USD 0.02): Principle 3 FAIL with exact citation (branch, codeRoots, offending path, diff command) + actionable coaching; 6 others PASS/ADVISORY with real citations. worktree open/list claims verified literally against the CLI. Raw output: s1-dogfood-review.md.

Link pass: root README (module-workflow paragraph), quick-start Where-to-go-next, extension README Get-started pointer (GitHub URLs), and the 094-deferred getting-started.md.template re-cut (Work Explorer name; new sections 2-4 matching the shipped two-section form + palette-first sequencing + row actions; parallel guidance re-homed to the advanced palette command; tutorial links). Template heading/closure pins in sessionGenPrompt.test.ts moved atomically; stale planImport.ts caller comment updated. Golden cold-start fixtures to be regenerated at the suite step.

Full suite green: pytest 2922 passed / 6 skipped; extension unit 1487 (moved template pins + goldens regenerated via UPDATE_GOLDEN, diff reviewed - only the two getting-started.md fixtures); Playwright Layer 3 26 passed (local per L-064-12); tsc --noEmit clean.

Round-1 verification (gpt-5-6, USD 0.18): ISSUES_FOUND, 4 Majors - all accepted and fixed in flight: (1) integration module now owns services/integration in the tutorial manifest + cast table (with a both-shapes-legal note); (2) hotfix drill tags v0.1.1 on the hotfix commit, never post-merge main (primer's two ambiguous echoes clarified per L-065-1); (3) review prompt's owner-review principle split into coverage/auto-request/enforcement/approval facts, best-effort gh PR-review gathering added, ADVISORY mandated when absent, Part 9 Expect wording made honest (requests vs requires); (4) integration set now declares prerequisites on 001+002, Alex opens his worktree only after both merge (Parts 5/6/9 resequenced; checklist item added). Dogfood re-run on rebuilt scratch repo (s1-dogfood-review-round-2.md): planted violation still FAILs with exact citation; owner-review now ADVISORY with the four-fact separation honored.

Round-2 verification (gpt-5-6, USD 0.22): ISSUES_FOUND, 5 fresh Majors - all accepted and fixed: P3 touches-exception (was contradicting P4); tag-ancestry evidence + no-presumably rule in P6 + coverage-only scope rule in P5 + decorated/peeled/range-log gathering; tutorial CI now one path job per module + required-checks selection step (Part 7 step 4, Part 1 deferral note); Part 5 serializes set generation (numbering race); evidence script sweeps local+remote branches. Scratch repo rebuilt (3-module CI); dogfood round 3 dispatched.

Round-3 verification (gpt-5-6, USD 0.24): ISSUES_FOUND, 6 fresh Majors - all accepted and fixed: branch protection resequenced to after the Part-3 scaffold push (direct-push contradiction + wrong activation claim removed; admin-bypass option named); Part 5 fully serialized (step-order contradiction from the R2 fix removed); companion review-prompt link added to getting-started.md.template (goldens + dist regenerated, unit 1487 green both passes); evidence script records fetch outcome + uses origin/main base; tag range/ancestry checks grouped per tag family with rev-list ancestry proof; changes job added to required checks + skipped-check limitation documented with the aggregate-gate production pattern. Doc-embedded script syntax-checked. Dogfood round 4 dispatched. Boundary set: round 4 not clean/Minor-only -> suspend to operator.

Round-4 verification (gpt-5-6, USD 0.23): ISSUES_FOUND, 2 fresh Majors (trend converging 4-5-6-2) - both accepted and fixed: Part 4 gained the explicit numbered landing step for 001 (authoring/ branch to avoid the session-set/* worktree name, PR, browser approval by a teammate pre-clone, merge, pull; Part 5 opening now assumes the merge); evidence script + prompt gather dated branch tips + per-branch divergence counts, and P1/P7 cap at ADVISORY without age/drift evidence. Doc script re-syntax-checked. Dogfood round 5 + verification round 5 dispatched; round 5 declared the hard stop (any fresh blocking finding suspends to the operator).

Round-5 verification (gpt-5-6, USD 0.30): ISSUES_FOUND, 2 fresh Majors - both accepted and fixed (pull-after-browser-merge sync in Parts 5/8/9; CODEOWNERS last-match-wins effective-owner resolution in the review prompt P4/P5/extraction/template). LOOP SUSPENDED at the declared hard stop per the severity-gated stop rule: 5 rounds, 19 findings, all fresh, all fixed, none disputed, grain steadily finer - no convergence to zero on an unbounded doc surface. R5 fixes are the only unverified delta. Disposition set to requires_review; work committed+pushed; operator adjudication requested (attested close / round 6 / third opinion / reshape).
